JiraSettings.ActiveSprintJqlTemplate: project = {0} AND issuetype in ({1}) AND sprint in openSprints() ORDER BY created DESC
JiraSettings.BacklogJqlTemplate: project = {0} AND issuetype in ({1}) AND sprint is EMPTY ORDER BY created DESC
JiraSettings.ActiveSprintJqlTemplate: project = {0} AND issuetype in ({1}) AND sprint = lastSprint() ORDER BY created DESC
JiraSettings.BacklogJqlTemplate: project = {0} AND issuetype in ({1}) AND sprint is EMPTY ORDER BY created DESC
